title: Caramel Crusted Carp Bowl
description: A sweet and savory dish featuring a caramel crust on pan-seared carp, served in a flavorful Vietnamese-inspired bowl.
instructions: Season the carp fillet with salt and pepper.
In a shallow dish, mix together caramel, fish sauce, and peanut butter (if using).
Dip the carp fillet in the caramel mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add the coated carp fillet.
Pan-fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until cooked to an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
While the carp is cooking, prepare the Vietnamese-style bowl by arranging chopped green onions and lime wedges on the bottom.
Once the carp is cooked, place it on top of the bowl and serve immediately.
